title: Cygnus (disambiguation)
content:
==Canon==
*'''[[Cygnus Anton]]''', a [[Chief Regional Auditor]] of the [[Galactic Empire]]
*'[[Cygnus Space Workshops|''Cygnus Spaceworks''']], a [[starship]] manufacturer

==Legends==
*'''[[Cygnus 5]]''', a boxy, short range [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Cygnus B system]]''', a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*'''[[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Spaceworks]]''', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer
*'''[[Cygnus Star Empire]]''', a small empire situated along the [[Oktos Route]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
{{Disambig}}
